foodOptions.name: MEXICAN BUFFET & NATIONAL OPEN BAR
foodOptions.description: Mexican Buffet: Chicken and beef Skewers, guacamole, chips, tortillas, quesadillas, and salsas. National Open Bar: Tequila, Rum, Vodka, light canned Beer, Soft drinks, and bottled water.

foodOptions.name: CHICKEN & VEGETARIAN MENU WITH NATIONAL OPEN BAR
foodOptions.description: Chicken and vegetarian skewers, guacamole, chips, tortillas, quesadillas, and salsas. National Open Bar: Tequila, Rum, Vodka, light canned Beer, Soft drinks, and bottled water.

foodOptions.name: TACOS & NATIONAL OPEN BAR
foodOptions.description: Beef and chicken tacos, guacamole, chips, tortillas, quesadillas, and salsas. National Open Bar: Tequila, Rum, Vodka, light canned Beer, Soft drinks, and bottled water.

foodOptions.name: FISHING HALF DAY MENU
foodOptions.description: Fishing Menu: Bagels, Croissants, Toast bread, Quesadillas. Charcuterie: Cold cuts, Cheese & fruit board. Salsas, Guacamole & Tortilla chips.

foodOptions.name: FISHING FULL DAY MENU
foodOptions.description: Fishing Menu: Bagels, Croissants, Toast bread, Quesadillas. Charcuterie: Cold cuts, Cheese & fruit board. Salsas, Guacamole & Tortilla chips. Plus: Charcoal-grilled beef and chicken tacos.

foodOptions.name: SNACKS & NATIONAL OPEN BAR
foodOptions.description: Snacks: Chips, Guacamole, Mexican Salsas. Charcutery: Tapas, cheese, crackers, nuts, and fresh fruit. Muffins. National Open Bar: Tequila, Rum, Vodka, light canned Beer, Soft drinks, and bottled water.
